arts.ttl: The reason why Real Madrid remain confident of landing Liverpool’s Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Speculation would appear to be rife concerning Trent Alexander Arnold’s continued employment with Liverpool Football Club. The 25-year-old England international has yet to commit to a contract beyond his current one, which is set to expire at the end of the current campaign. arts.ttl: The Miracle of Istanbul: Jerzy Dudek reflects on Liverpool’s legendary Champions League triumph
arts.sum: Former Liverpool goalkeeper Jerzy Dudek shared his memories of Liverpool’s miraculous Champions League victory against Milan. The one-time Polish international sp0ke to La Gazzetta dello Sport about the 2005 final against AC Milan, a match that has become etched in football lore. Liverpool found themselves in a dire situation at halftime, trailing 3-0 to a star-studded Milan side. Dudek recalls the turning point: “The comeback began in the dressing room. We had to score three goals and prove we weren’t the team from the first half.” The Polish keeper credits the Liverpool fans for providing crucial energy. “The fans were The post The Miracle of Istanbul: Jerzy Dudek reflects on Liverpool’s legendary Champions League triumph appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Who is Espen Eskas, the referee for AC Milan - Liverpool? Champions League 2024/25
arts.sum: Norway’s Espen Eskas will be the match referee for today’s heavyweight Champions League clash at the San Siro, where seven-time European champions AC Milan host six-time winners Liverpool. Milan and Liverpool face off on the opening matchday of the Champions League’s new league phase, in which each team plays eight games - four at home, four away - against eight different sides.
